title: Senior Financial Analyst - EY India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - EY India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
EY India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EY India:
EY India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India!
